reviews.author: Shweta Patel
reviews.review_body: My baby has been 2 months approx to going to school and I felt there atmosphere is very caring.especially class's teacher has been a mother touch for every little ones...I am grateful to all  staff members..

reviews.author: Juhi Srivastava
reviews.review_body:
Hello sir,

I had done Bachelor of Fine Arts (B.F.A) and also  Master in Fine Arts.(M.F.A)
Is there vaccancy for Arts and craft teacher???

reviews.author: Vikrant Singh
reviews.review_body: My triplets are studying in this school and they are still toddlers, they have been taken care well and learning very swiftly. Staff is really caring, no fuss.

reviews.author: Garv Chauhan
reviews.review_body: Modern school is in greater Noida with preschool under muskan school chain. Overall infrastructure seems to be good but still construction is in progress will take another few months to complete. Fees comparatively high with respect to first branch in greater Noida. Results and response awaited from school and parents. I am giving 3star because instead if proving first they are charging like comparatively high.

reviews.author: Ganga Bisht
reviews.review_body:
every school is precious
I given 3 * because this is new school and without personal experience nobody can give view good or bad.
well i living in delhi now and shifting to greater noida next year
my son now studying in summer field school (Kailash colony, New Delhi),
which is one of the best school.
We have to shift greater noida in 2018 January permanently,
so my wish to find a best school for my child,
in greater noida there are lot of school and few are very high in fee too.
i m confused where to go, can anyone suggest or advise me about modern public school
i gone through school website but not able to get information
as every thing showing some error when open to  menu.
and building also in 3D pic .
please give proper information if anyone can give (with fee structure)
thanks
